sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../App'; import './WorkshopDetailsPage.css'; const WORKSHOPS = { 1: { id: 1, name: 'Python', duration: 2, emoji: '🐍', desc: 'A comprehensive 2-day workshop covering Python fundamentals, scripting, data analysis with NumPy/Pandas, and automation techniques. Suitable for students from all engineering disciplines.', tags: ['Programming', 'Data Science'], prerequisites: ['Basic programming knowledge', 'Laptop with internet connection'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['Python syntax and data types', 'Functions, modules and packages', 'File I/O and error handling'] }, { day: 2, topics: ['NumPy arrays and operations', 'Pandas DataFrames', 'Matplotlib visualisation', 'Mini project'] }, ], tnc: 'The coordinator is responsible for arranging a computer lab with Python 3 installed. Minimum 20 participants required. FOSSEE reserves the right to reschedule the workshop.', }, 2: { id: 2, name: 'Scilab', duration: 3, emoji: '📐', desc: 'A 3-day deep dive into Scilab for numerical computing, matrix operations, and engineering simulations. Ideal for mechanical and electrical engineering students.', tags: ['Engineering', 'Math'], prerequisites: ['Basic mathematics', 'Engineering background preferred'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['Scilab interface', 'Matrix operations', 'Basic programming'] }, { day: 2, topics: ['Control systems', 'Signal processing', 'Toolboxes'] }, { day: 3, topics: ['Simulation projects', 'Xcos block diagrams', 'Case studies'] }, ], tnc: 'Lab with Scilab 6.x installed required. Minimum 20 participants.', }, 3: { id: 3, name: 'OpenFOAM', duration: 5, emoji: '💨', desc: 'An intensive 5-day workshop on Computational Fluid Dynamics using OpenFOAM. Covers meshing, solver configuration, post-processing and real-world simulation cases.', tags: ['Engineering', 'Simulation'], prerequisites: ['Fluid mechanics knowledge', 'Linux basics', 'Finite element fundamentals'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['OpenFOAM introduction', 'Case directory structure'] }, { day: 2, topics: ['Meshing with snappyHexMesh', 'Boundary conditions'] }, { day: 3, topics: ['Incompressible flow solvers', 'turbulence modelling'] }, { day: 4, topics: ['Compressible flow', 'Heat transfer'] }, { day: 5, topics: ['Post-processing with ParaView', 'Project presentations'] }, ], tnc: 'Linux workstations with OpenFOAM 8+ required. Min 15 participants.', }, 4: { id: 4, name: 'DWSIM', duration: 2, emoji: '⚗️', desc: 'A 2-day workshop on DWSIM for chemical process simulation. Learn steady-state simulation, thermodynamic packages, and unit operations.', tags: ['Chemical', 'Simulation'], prerequisites: ['Chemical engineering background', 'Thermodynamics basics'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['DWSIM interface', 'Flowsheet creation', 'Thermodynamic packages'] }, { day: 2, topics: ['Reactors and separators', 'Heat exchangers', 'Complete process simulation'] }, ], tnc: 'DWSIM installed on all lab systems. Minimum 20 participants.', }, 5: { id: 5, name: 'eSim', duration: 3, emoji: '⚡', desc: 'A 3-day electronics design workshop using eSim (KiCad + ngspice). From schematic capture to SPICE simulation and PCB layout fundamentals.', tags: ['Electronics', 'Design'], prerequisites: ['Basic electronics', 'Fundamentals of circuit analysis'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['eSim interface', 'Schematic editor', 'Component libraries'] }, { day: 2, topics: ['SPICE simulation', 'Waveform analysis', 'Op-amp circuits'] }, { day: 3, topics: ['PCB layout basics', 'Design rule check', 'Project'] }, ], tnc: 'eSim installed on all systems. Min 20 participants.', }, 6: { id: 6, name: 'R', duration: 2, emoji: '📊', desc: 'A 2-day workshop on R for statistical analysis, data manipulation, and visualisation with ggplot2. Perfect for students in statistics, biology, and economics.', tags: ['Statistics', 'Data Science'], prerequisites: ['Basic statistics knowledge', 'No prior programming needed'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['R and RStudio basics', 'Data types and structures', 'Data manipulation with dplyr'] }, { day: 2, topics: ['Data visualisation with ggplot2', 'Statistical tests', 'Mini project'] }, ], tnc: 'R and RStudio installed. Minimum 20 participants.', }, 7: { id: 7, name: 'Arduino', duration: 2, emoji: '🤖', desc: 'A 2-day hands-on Arduino workshop covering embedded C programming, sensor interfacing, actuator control, and basic IoT concepts.', tags: ['Electronics', 'IoT'], prerequisites: ['Basic electronics', 'C programming basics'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['Arduino IDE', 'Digital/Analog I/O', 'Sensor interfacing'] }, { day: 2, topics: ['Motor control', 'Serial communication', 'IoT mini project'] }, ], tnc: 'Arduino Uno kits provided by FOSSEE. Lab with USB access required.', }, 8: { id: 8, name: 'LaTeX', duration: 1, emoji: '📝', desc: 'A 1-day workshop on LaTeX for scientific document preparation. Learn to write research papers, reports, theses, and presentations.', tags: ['Writing', 'Research'], prerequisites: ['No prior experience needed'], outline: [ { day: 1, topics: ['LaTeX basics', 'Math typesetting', 'Figures and tables', 'Bibliography with BibTeX', 'Beamer presentations'] }, ], tnc: 'TeX Live or MiKTeX installed. Minimum 20 participants.', }, }; export default function WorkshopDetailsPage() { const { id } = useParams(); const { user } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const w = WORKSHOPS[parseInt(id)]; if (!w) { return (
🔍
